name: vllm-ascend on Huawei Ascend NPU
description: AccelMark runner for Huawei Ascend 910B/910C NPUs using vllm-ascend (vLLM community fork for CANN). Supports Suite A–E. NPU memory queried via torch_npu. FP8 excluded: not supported on current Ascend 910B/910C hardware.
notes: vllm-ascend preserves the standard vLLM Python API — inference code is identical to the NVIDIA vLLM runner. Distributed teardown uses HCCL via torch.distributed. Memory stats via torch_npu.npu.
